title: Astra Otoparts / PT. Inti Ganda Perdana ransomware incident

victim.name: Astra Otoparts / PT. Inti Ganda Perdana

extortion.description: Stock Symbol AUTO.JK www.astra-otoparts.com http://www.igpgroup.astra.co.id https://www.zoominfo.com/c/pt-astra-otoparts-tbk/344291036 https://rocketreach.co/pt-inti-ganda-perdana-profile_b5c1ba2ff42e08d3 20 billion USD revenue. Astra Otoparts is an Indonesia-based manufacturing company. The Company is engaged in the trading of automotive components for domestic and international markets, including other Asian countries, the Middle East and Africa. It is also engaged in the manufacture of metal, automotive components and plastics. PT. Inti Ganda Perdana mainly manufactures rear axle and propeller shafts, and has decided on its mission to become a reliable drive shaft and drive axle manufacturer, with a vision to become a company with competitive advantage on the global market.
